steps.title: Restate the claim
steps.content: The claim: the authors describe how restorative sleep can be for young people. The correct quote must mention sleep AND its restorative effect on the young.

steps.title: Match the quotation
steps.content:
Choice C: "Blessed are the slumbers of the innocent! They are kindlier than balm, and they refresh and gladden the spirit of childhood." That hits both ideas — sleep (slumbers) and restorative power for young people (refresh childhood).

  • A is about Blue Beard / curiosity
  • B is about humble stories
  • D is about home — none mention sleep
.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
